hero.eyebrow: Pros bid in minutes — you pick the price
hero.sub: Post your job. Verified pros race to bid. Your money stays protected in escrow until the work is done.
hero.ctaPrimary: Post a Job — Get Bids in Minutes

items.a: Yes — posting a job is always free. You only pay once you accept a bid, and that payment goes straight into protected escrow.
Your payment is held by Servigic, not the pro, until you confirm the job is done. If something's wrong, you can open a dispute before funds are released.

items.q: What if the pro finds extra work on-site?
items.a: They submit a Change Order with a photo and price — you approve (and pay the difference into escrow) before any extra work happens.
Every job carries a 7-day workmanship warranty. Open a dispute and our team reviews photos from both sides to release, partially refund, or fully refund your payment.

items.q: Why can't I see the pro's phone number before paying?
items.a: Contact details stay masked until payment is secured — this stops off-platform deals that leave you with zero protection.
For Emergency jobs, most customers see their first bid in under 10 minutes since every matching nearby pro is alerted instantly.
Straight to EasyPaisa, JazzCash, or bank transfer after you confirm the job is done, minus Servigic's 12% commission.
Launching in Karachi, then Lahore and Islamabad/Rawalpindi, followed by GCC and North America.
